Welcome to Equa-SERVE Ltd
	
		
			Equa-SERVE Ltd is a firm registered in offering quantity surveying and construction cost consultancy services in Tanzania.The company was registered in the year 2009 and has been in operation since then.
The company is fully owned by two Tanzanians, namely Bernard Ndakidemi and Daniel Mwita, both of them with more than nineteen years of experience in the Tanzania construction industry and they are both degree qualified from University of Dar es Salaam.
In additional, Equa-SERVE Ltd is registered with Architects and Quantity Surveyors Registration Board (AQRB) of Tanzania as a quantity surveying consulting firm with registration number QPL66.109.11/09.
The registered office of the company is situated along Mori
